ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon image of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the category is active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., artist, collector, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* The user's location */,
  "website" TEXT /* The user's website URL */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* The user's Twitter handle */,
  "discord_handle" TEXT /* The user's Discord handle */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user is verified */,
  "stripe_customer_id" TEXT /* The user's Stripe customer ID for payment processing */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user is banned */,
  "ban_reason" TEXT /* The reason why the user was banned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "nft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NFT sold */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the NFT was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the sale */,
  "tx_hash" TEXT /* The transaction hash of the sale */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* The block number where the sale was recorded */,
  "is_refundable" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the sale is refundable */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* The date when the sale can be refunded (if applicable) */,
  "is_disputed" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the sale is disputed */,
  "dispute_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the dispute */,
  "dispute_status" TEXT /* The status of the dispute (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "commission" REAL /* The commission percentage taken by the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "nft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NFT */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the ownership started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the ownership ended (null if currently owned) */,
  "tx_hash" TEXT /* The transaction hash of the ownership transfer */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* The block number where the ownership transfer was recorded */,
  "is_transferable" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the ownership can be transferred */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* The date when the ownership can be transferred (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "nft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NFT */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* The type of the attribute (e.g., string, number, boolean) */,
  "attribute_description" TEXT /* A description of the attribute */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the attribute is required */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the attribute is visible to the public */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the role is the default role */,
  "is_system_role" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the role is a system role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was granted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "is_temporary" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the permission is temporary */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The date when the permission expires (if temporary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
